records.description: Aalto's own chat-based AI assistant for staff and students, built by Aalto IT Services and School of Science/RSE service.
records.howToObtain: Visit ai.aalto.fi, choose login, and sign in with an Aalto user ID.
records.costToUser: No direct user charge; Aalto asks users to monitor monthly usage against internal limits.

evidence.sourceTitle: Students: using AI in your studies - Aalto University
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Aalto AI Assistant is the university's own AI tool. It is secure, free of charge, and data you input will not be used to train the model.

evidence.sourceTitle: Aalto AI Assistant - Aalto University
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Whether you're a staff member or student, Aalto AI Assistant, our new AI tool, is here to support you in your daily activities.

records.description: UC Davis Aggie AI pilot for finding answers about UC Davis-specific topics and connecting with campus support services.
records.howToObtain: Open Rocky AI Chat from the UC Davis Aggie AI tools page.
records.costToUser: No cost for UC Davis and UC Davis Health students, faculty, and staff.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI Tools - UC Davis IET
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Rocky AI Chat is ideal for finding answers about UC Davis-specific topics and connecting with campus support services. Available to UC Davis and UC Davis Health students, faculty and staff at no cost.

records.description: UC Davis limited pilot for finding answers from course-specific and instructor-approved content in Canvas.
records.howToObtain: Available only in participating pilot courses.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI Tools - UC Davis IET
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Rocky in Canvas is ideal for finding answers course-specific and instructor-approved content in UC Davis Canvas. Available as a limited pilot to a small number of courses.

records.description: UC Davis pilot AI features for generating text, images, titles, alt tags, and related content in SiteFarm.
records.howToObtain: Available as a pilot to UC Davis campus web content creators and managers.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI Tools - UC Davis IET
evidence.evidenceSnippet: SiteFarm AI Features are ideal for generating text, images, titles, alt tags and more in the campus web content management system. Available at no cost as a pilot to UC Davis campus web content creators and managers.

records.description: UC Davis Aggie AI-listed Zoom features for meeting summaries, action items, in-meeting questions, and smart transcriptions.
records.howToObtain: Use the Zoom AI Companion entry linked from Aggie AI tools.
records.costToUser: No cost for UC Davis students, faculty, and staff.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI Tools - UC Davis IET
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Zoom AI Companion is built into Zoom and available at no cost to UC Davis students, faculty and staff.

records.description: UC Davis Aggie AI-listed Google Workspace AI assistant for fact-checking, real-time knowledge, and multimodal work.
records.howToObtain: Access through UC Davis Google Workspace.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI Tools - UC Davis IET
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Google Gemini is available to UC Davis campus students, faculty and staff in the UC Davis Google Workspace.

records.description: UC Davis Aggie AI-listed tool for organizing, summarizing, and synthesizing information from multiple documents.
records.howToObtain: Access through the NotebookLM entry linked from Aggie AI tools.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI Tools - UC Davis IET
evidence.evidenceSnippet: NotebookLM is ideal for organizing, summarizing, and synthesizing information from multiple documents into new, original content. Available to UC Davis campus students, faculty and staff.

records.description: UC Davis Aggie AI-listed ChatGPT Edu subscription for research, data analysis, content creation, and writing.
records.howToObtain: Available by subscription to UC Davis campus faculty and staff.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI Tools - UC Davis IET
evidence.evidenceSnippet: ChatGPT Edu is available by subscription to UC Davis campus faculty and staff. Coming soon to UCDH staff.

records.description: UC Davis Aggie AI-listed Microsoft chat tool for drafting emails, summaries, presentations, and data analysis.
records.howToObtain: Access via the UC Davis Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat product brief.
records.costToUser: No cost for UC Davis and UC Davis Health students, faculty, and staff.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI Tools - UC Davis IET
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat is available to UC Davis and UC Davis Health students, faculty, and staff at no cost.

records.description: UC Davis Aggie AI-listed Adobe tool for generating and editing images, videos, and text.
records.howToObtain: Use an eligible UC Davis campus Adobe account.
records.costToUser: Available to UC Davis campus Adobe account holders.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI Tools - UC Davis IET
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Adobe Firefly is ideal for generating and editing images, videos, and text. Available to UC Davis campus Adobe account holders.

records.rawToolName: Microsoft Copilot with commercial data protection
records.description: University of Helsinki-supported Microsoft Copilot service for text and image generation with commercial data protection.
records.howToObtain: Use https://copilot.cloud.microsoft as a Helsinki student or staff member over 18.
records.costToUser: Free access for University of Helsinki students and staff over 18.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI at the University - University of Helsinki IT Helpdesk
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The University of Helsinki has two general-purpose generative AI solutions: Microsoft Copilot with commercial data protection, available for all students and staff members over the age of 18, and CurreChat.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI at the University - University of Helsinki IT Helpdesk
evidence.evidenceSnippet: If you are a University of Helsinki student or staff member over the age of 18, you have free access to the Microsoft Copilot with commercial data protection service.

records.description: University of Helsinki-created generative AI tool for staff and teaching use, running OpenAI models in the university's Microsoft Azure cloud service in the EU.
records.howToObtain: Use https://curre.helsinki.fi/chat; teaching use requires the CurreChat form.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI at the University - University of Helsinki IT Helpdesk
evidence.evidenceSnippet: CurreChat is restricted for use by the staff and for teaching purposes.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI services at the University of Helsinki
evidence.evidenceSnippet: CurreChat is a generative AI tool created for the University community. CurreChat uses large language models developed by OpenAI, located in the University of Helsinki's Microsoft Azure cloud service in the EU.

records.description: University of Helsinki language model-based machine translation service for English, Swedish, and Finnish.
records.howToObtain: Use translate.helsinki.fi from the University network or via VPN.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI at the University - University of Helsinki IT Helpdesk
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The University has a language model-based machine translation service called Kontra, which is available at https://translate.helsinki.fi.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI services at the University of Helsinki
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The Kontra translation engine developed at the University of Helsinki is available in the University network via a VPN connection.

records.description: UCD College of Arts and Humanities guidance says students can access Google Gemini through UCD Connect to experiment with generative AI under institutional licensing.
records.howToObtain: Access through a UCD Connect account.

evidence.sourceTitle: Traffic Light System - UCD College of Arts and Humanities
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Students have access to Google Gemini and Microsoft Co-Pilot through their UCD Connect accounts so you can experiment with generative AI without having to set up an account with a third party.

records.description: UCD College of Arts and Humanities guidance says students can access Microsoft Co-Pilot through UCD Connect under an institutional licence.
records.howToObtain: Access through a UCD Connect account.

evidence.sourceTitle: Traffic Light System - UCD College of Arts and Humanities
evidence.evidenceSnippet: These tools are available through an institutional licence that offers greater data protection.

records.description: Leiden staff guidance says ChatGPT is not supported because data security and privacy are not guaranteed.
records.howToObtain: Not supported by Leiden University.

evidence.sourceTitle: Werken met AI - Leiden University
evidence.evidenceSnippet: ChatGPT wordt niet ondersteund door Universiteit Leiden. De veiligheid van je gegevens en je privacy is niet gegarandeerd.

records.description: Rice-supported writing assistant listed in Rice Digital Learning's AI tools hub.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI in Education - Rice University Digital Learning
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Rice University provides access to several AI-powered tools to support instruction, research, and administrative work. Rice-Supported AI Tools include Grammarly.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Rice-Supported AI Tools include AI Microsoft Copilot.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Rice-Supported AI Tools include Google Gemini.

records.description: University of Oslo-developed privacy-friendly GPT chat that lets UiO users use OpenAI models within UiO privacy requirements.
records.howToObtain: Sign in to GPT UiO with FEIDE.
records.costToUser: Free use is stated for students and staff at UiO and partners.

evidence.sourceTitle: GPT UiO - University of Oslo
evidence.evidenceSnippet: GPT UiO is a University of Oslo-developed service that allows all users to use AI models from OpenAI within the privacy requirements set by UiO.

evidence.sourceTitle: GPT UiO - University of Oslo
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Students and staff at UiO and other partners can log in with FEIDE and freely use the service.

records.description: UiO student guidance recommends Microsoft Copilot alongside GPT UiO for secure AI use.
records.howToObtain: Use Microsoft Copilot through UiO-recommended access and follow course rules.

evidence.sourceTitle: How to use AI as a student - University of Oslo
evidence.evidenceSnippet: We recommend using GPT UiO or Microsoft Copilot, as this ensures your data is secure. Neither personal information nor data you input will be shared further.

records.description: Waterloo guidance directs users to use Microsoft Copilot through their UWaterloo account for privacy and security protection.
records.howToObtain: Use Microsoft Copilot through a UWaterloo account.

evidence.sourceTitle: Artificial intelligence and ChatGPT - University of Waterloo
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Microsoft Copilot should be used through your UWaterloo account in order to protect the privacy and security of the data that you enter.

evidence.sourceTitle: Artificial Intelligence at UW - University of Waterloo
evidence.evidenceSnippet: University of Waterloo staff, faculty, have access to Microsoft Copilot through their institutional account.

records.rawToolName: Microsoft Copilot Enterprise AI chat service
records.description: Georgia Tech enterprise Copilot chat tool with text, graphic, and code generation plus commercial data protection.
records.howToObtain: Use Georgia Tech OIT's Copilot Chat getting-started route.

evidence.sourceTitle: Resources for Available AI Tools - Georgia Tech OIT
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The Copilot chat tool offers text, graphic, and code generation with commercial data protection.

evidence.sourceTitle: Georgia Tech Accelerates Access to Generative AI Tools
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Georgia Tech is accelerating access to generative artificial intelligence tools with the recent addition of the Microsoft Copilot Enterprise AI chat service.

records.description: Georgia Tech enterprise Google Gemini access for faculty and staff through managed environments.
records.howToObtain: Faculty and staff access Gemini at gemini.g.gatech.edu; students, affiliates, and temporary employees request a Google for Education license through MyAccess Packages.

evidence.sourceTitle: Georgia Tech Adds Gemini and Notebook LM to AI Service Offerings
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Georgia Tech's Office of Information Technology continues to accelerate access to enterprise AI tools with the recent addition of Google Gemini and NotebookLM, now available to faculty and staff.

evidence.sourceTitle: Georgia Tech Adds Gemini and Notebook LM to AI Service Offerings
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Faculty and staff access to Gemini is available at https://gemini.g.gatech.edu.

records.description: Georgia Tech enterprise NotebookLM access for faculty and staff through managed environments.
records.howToObtain: Faculty and staff access NotebookLM at notebooklm.g.gatech.edu; students, affiliates, and temporary employees request a Google for Education license through MyAccess Packages.

evidence.sourceTitle: Georgia Tech Adds Gemini and Notebook LM to AI Service Offerings
evidence.evidenceSnippet: NotebookLM functions as a research-focused assistant, which allows users to upload documents and receive responses grounded in their own provided data.

evidence.sourceTitle: Georgia Tech Adds Gemini and Notebook LM to AI Service Offerings
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Faculty and staff access to NotebookLM is available at https://notebooklm.g.gatech.edu.

records.description: Georgia Tech AI Smart Pass loaner program temporary access to Copilot for Microsoft 365 for faculty and staff project-based use.

records.costToUser: Temporary loaner access; cost not specified.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: The AI Smart Pass loaner program provides temporary access to Copilot for Microsoft 365 and Open AI ChatGPT Edu for faculty and staff.

records.description: Georgia Tech AI Smart Pass loaner program temporary access to OpenAI ChatGPT Edu for faculty and staff project-based use.
records.howToObtain: Apply through OIT's AI Smart Pass loaner program.
records.costToUser: Temporary loaner access; cost not specified.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: OIT invites Georgia Tech faculty and staff to participate in the AI Smart Pass loaner program, which provides temporary access to Copilot for Microsoft 365 and Open AI ChatGPT Edu.
